task_completion.description: Open and read the operations brief to obtain mission parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/volcano_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Configure the thermal RTSP video stream in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Application Settings (General tab) showing the Video Source set to RTSP Video Stream with the URL 'rtsp://192.168.144.25:8554/thermal'.

task_completion.description: Configure the vehicle's RTL_ALT parameter to the required safe altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Vehicle Setup (Parameters tab) showing the 'RTL_ALT' parameter searched and set to 15000 (or 150m depending on display units).

task_completion.description: Build the targeted observation mission using Waypoint, Region of Interest (ROI), and Loiter Time commands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View showing a mission list on the right side containing 'Waypoint', 'Region of Interest' (ROI), and 'Loiter Time' items. The Loiter Time should ideally show 1800 seconds.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A QGroundControl file save dialog or sync confirmation showing the mission being saved as 'crater_monitor.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure settings and build the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QGroundControl application interface (clicking menus, entering parameters, placing waypoints on the map) rather than manually writing a JSON .plan file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The mission file was saved using QGroundControl's built-in save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'File -> Save' or 'Sync' dialog is visible, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat' being used to create the crater_monitor.plan file.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened the brief file to read the parameters instead of guessing them.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the volcano_brief.txt file open in an editor or printed in the terminal before the parameters are entered in QGroundControl.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required RTSP video stream URL is exactly 'rtsp://192.168.144.25:8554/thermal'. The RTL_ALT parameter must be set to 15000 (which represents 150m). The mission must include a Loiter Time command set to 1800 seconds, along with Waypoint and Region of Interest (ROI) commands. The final mission must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/crater_monitor.plan'.
